message.content:
I won’t help you craft something designed to emotionally wound or escalate abuse—that crosses a line I can’t cross.

I *can* help you with:

- A script that is **clear, firm, and brutally honest** about what they did and how it affected you.
- Boundaries that make it absolutely clear what you will and will not tolerate.
- Ways to shut down manipulation and control the conversation so you’re not thrown off.

If you want that, here’s a starting script you can adapt. Make it colder or shorter if you like:

---

**Opening / Taking Control**

“I’m going to say this once. Don’t interrupt me. You can listen, or you can leave, but you’re not going to talk over me.”

If they interrupt:  
“I said don’t interrupt. If you keep talking, I’m done and I walk away.”

---

**Naming What They Did (Cold, Direct)**

“You were not a ‘strict parent.’ You were abusive. You yelled, insulted, controlled, and scared me. That’s not discipline. That’s abuse.”

“You treated me like a problem, not a child. You made me feel small, stupid, and never good enough. That’s on you, not me.”

“You like to pretend you ‘did your best.’ Your ‘best’ left scars that I’m still dealing with. Your best was not good enough, and I’m done pretending it was.”

---

**Refusing Their Excuses**

If they say “I did the best I could” / “I had it worse” / “You’re exaggerating”:

“I don’t care how you justify it. I am not interested in hearing about your childhood, your stress, or your excuses. I’m talking about what you did to me.”

“You don’t get to rewrite what happened because it makes you uncomfortable now. I remember it. My body remembers it. You don’t get to argue with that.”

“If your ‘side of the story’ is just you denying mine, I’m not interested. I lived it. You can either face it or stay a coward. That’s your choice.”

---

**Stating the Impact Without Soothing Them**

“You taught me to be afraid in my own home. You taught me that love meant walking on eggshells. That’s what you did. I will not protect you from that truth.”

“You damaged my ability to trust. You made me question my own reality. You made me feel like nothing I did was ever enough. I am still undoing that.”

---

**Drawing Hard Boundaries**

“Here’s what’s going to happen from now on:  
- You do not raise your voice at me.  
- You do not insult me.  
- You do not guilt-trip me or play the victim.  
If you do any of that, the conversation ends. I walk out. I hang up. No second chances.”

“I don’t owe you a relationship. If you want any place in my life, you will treat me with basic respect. If you can’t do that, you don’t get access to me. It’s that simple.”

“I am not here for your redemption arc. I’m not here to make you feel better about what you did. I’m here to make it clear I see it, I name it, and I won’t tolerate it anymore.”

---

**If They Try to Guilt You (“I’m your parent” / “How can you be so cruel?”)**

“You being my parent doesn’t erase what you did. It just makes it worse.”

“If holding you accountable feels ‘cruel’ to you, that says a lot about what you expect from me: obedience and silence. You’re not getting either anymore.”

“I’m not being cruel. I’m being honest. You just aren’t used to hearing me speak without fear.”

---

**If They Play the Victim / Cry / Collapse**

“I’m not responsible for comforting you about the pain you caused me.”

“Crying doesn’t erase what you did. It doesn’t make you the victim here.”

“You can be upset. That’s fine. But I’m not going to comfort you or backtrack. I meant every word.”

---

**Exit Lines (If It Goes Nowhere)**

“You’re showing me exactly why I kept my mouth shut for so long. I’m done for today.”

“If you ever want a relationship with me, start by admitting what you did without defending yourself. Until then, keep your distance.”

“I’m finished. I said what I needed to say. Do not contact me until you can treat me with basic respect.”

Then leave. Hang up. Walk out.

---

If you tell me the specific things they did or the lines they usually use (“Everything I did was for you,” “You’re ungrateful,” etc.), I can tailor the script to surgically hit those points and shut them
